turns.name: Discover forest scope
turns.user: Discover forest/domain scope and list discovered domain controllers for this run.

turns.name: Prepare LDAP verification scope
turns.user: Could you verify LDAP connectivity across forest as well? First confirm scope and planned checks only.

turns.name: Per-DC LDAP matrix
turns.user: Return a compact per-DC matrix for LDAP 389, LDAPS 636, GC 3268/3269 with pass/fail and brief evidence.

turns.name: ADWS endpoint check
turns.user: Also check ADWS endpoint responsiveness across the same discovered DCs and include exact blocker text per failed host.

turns.name: Cross-pack DNS quick check
turns.user: Quickly check DNS health for ad.evotec.xyz and summarize in two lines.

turns.name: Explicit tool capability question
turns.user: What is `eventlog_evtx_query` and when should I use it?

turns.name: Final summary
turns.user: Summarize final LDAP and ADWS findings in 6 bullets with UTC markers and no follow-up question.
